nasb.text: Now there was a herd of many swine feeding there on the mountain; and the demons implored Him to permit them to enter the swine. And He gave them permission.

esv.text: Now a large herd of pigs was feeding there on the hillside, and they begged him to let them enter these. So he gave them permission.

cnv.text: 那裡有一大群豬正在山上吃東西。他們求耶穌准他們進入豬群。耶穌准許了，

ccb.text: 当时有一大群猪在附近山坡上觅食，污鬼就央求耶稣准许它们进入猪群，耶稣答应了。

csbs.text: 当时，那里有一大群猪正在山上吃食。那些鬼魔就央求耶稣准许它们进入那些猪里，耶稣准许了它们。
